narrative:
Precinct Ottawa Hills 2 (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,218 registered voters, with 49.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.6%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.1 percentage points.
